purpose: Collect project explanation documents, operating guides, architecture notes, and visual HTML explainers for AMCore without storing project secrets or live project data.
rules: Store document metadata and relative file paths only.
Do not store tokens, secrets, customer records, task records, report records, message records, or attachment records.
Prefer stable document IDs so future references do not break when titles change.
When a new project explanation document is created, add it to this registry and to docs/PROJECT_DOCUMENT_DATABASE.md.

documents.title: AM_Core project overview
documents.summary: Explains AM_Core as the shared planning and upgrade center for AM-style LINE/Notion assistant projects.

documents.title: AM Core architecture split plan
documents.summary: Defines the staged split between AM_Core, HOZO_AM, and SevenAM.

documents.title: AM project standardization rules
documents.summary: Defines project identity, environment naming, Notion naming, and data boundary standards.

documents.title: Upgrade package standard
documents.summary: Defines required files and metadata for AM-IMP upgrade packages.

documents.title: Install version workflow
documents.summary: Explains how to install an AM_Core upgrade package into a project without mixing data.

documents.title: Current version matrix
documents.summary: Tracks visible version state across HOZO AM and 7AM.

documents.title: Notion database view layouts
documents.summary: Human-readable registry for shared Notion view layout definitions.

documents.title: LINE new group and message registration flow
documents.summary: Visual explainer for what happens when a LINE message from a new group enters the AM system, including which Notion tables should be updated.

documents.title: Total control task classification and project assignment flow
documents.summary: Flowchart for deciding whether incoming LINE messages become total control tasks, how project and goal assignment should work, and where the controller can intervene.

documents.title: Report intervention action standard
documents.summary: Defines the six standard controller actions for report candidates, the decision statuses, candidate contract, and report-slot intervention rules.

documents.title: 08:00 daily report intervention form prototype
documents.summary: Interactive prototype showing how the 08:00 daily report can present today's goals, candidate items, standard controller actions, and a decision write-back panel.

documents.title: Judgment calibration knowledge base
documents.summary: Defines how AM projects send uncertain task judgments to the controller, capture LINE feedback, update project-local tasks, and extract reusable judgment rules without mixing project data.

documents.title: Meeting checkbox task standard
documents.summary: Defines that checkbox items inside meeting records are confirmed tasks and should enter project-local tracking without extra task confirmation.

documents.title: Total-control task title rules
documents.summary: Defines how total-control task titles should be written without exposing Notion page IDs, LINE IDs, message IDs, or sync IDs.
